title: bolbitis novoguineensis
intro: Bolbitis novoguineensis, also known as the New Guinea chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bolbitis novoguineensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Bolbitis novoguineensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine.
